understandNonBinarity.title: Understand non-binarity
understandNonBinarity.nonBinaryDefinitionText: A non-binary person is someone who does not fully, always and/or exclusively identify as male or female, and non-binarity is the concept of this.
understandNonBinarity.imageAlt: Illustrative image of a heart with non-binary pride colors

whatWeDid.title: What we have done so far

ourHistory.title: Our history
ourHistory.description: The <highlight>Brazilian Non-Binary Articulation (ABRANB)</highlight> brings together <highlight>non-binary people</highlight> from different regions in a <highlight>horizontal organization</highlight>. We work with both thematic groups and state-specific groups to <highlight>carry out initiatives relevant to the non-binary community</highlight>, such as taking steps to improve access to documents and healthcare.

agendaSummary.title: Agenda Summary
agendaSummary.description-1: Together, we built a summarized list of necessary and specific demands regarding our diverse community, based on consultations in a non-binary forum (3 thousand people) and internal discussions within the coalition (170 people).
agendaSummary.description-2: Some urgent topics that need to be discussed:

topics.topic-1: Access to civil registration with recognized non-binary identity
topics.topic-2: Access to education free from cisnormativity/cisgender supremacy
topics.topic-3: Access to personal and collective recognition in the Brazilian language

documentsProduced.title: Produced Documents
documentsProduced.description: We produce bimonthly and annual documents reporting the activities and developments within our organization, covering several essential topics and working groups involving multiple professional areas that impact our communities.

historicalArchives.title: Historical Archives
historicalArchives.description: One of our collective efforts has been gathering images, articles, and books related to our gender-diverse communities (non-binary, trans, and travesti) to help preserve the memory and history of those who came before us.

thematicAreas.title: Thematic Areas
thematicAreas.description: Some of us, as researchers, produce article-based content about our non-binary community across thematic fields such as Health, Technology, Law, and more.

joinOurUnion.title: Become Part of Our Network
joinOurUnion.description: We communicate internally and continuously through Telegram to discuss initiatives, develop working groups, support other non-binary collectives, and coordinate activities within the network. We also have dedicated groups for different thematic areas, such as communication, programming, and health.

donation.title: Donate Any Amount
donation.description: A donation is also a meaningful way to support diverse people and organizations, helping our network continue its activities and initiatives. Together, we build a more empathetic and inclusive world for everyone. Your contribution makes a real difference!
